purpose: Document local formal-hot-day SOLWEIG forcing files used for pre-scale QA.

claim_boundary.allowed: formal-hot-day SOLWEIG forcing provenance for Tmrt modifier robustness QA

expected_umep_met_header: %iy id it imin qn qh qe qs qf U RH Tair pres rain kdown snow ldown fcld wuh xsmd lai_hr Kdiff Kdir Wd
notes: Generate or verify these files locally from the accepted formal-hot-day forcing workflow before running QGIS/SOLWEIG.
Do not commit large forcing or raw archive files unless intentionally size-controlled and reviewed.
Use INPUTMET, not INPUT_MET, in SOLWEIG parameter dicts.
